summary: Added optional Site Registry / telemetry projection row providers to the dashboard package. `buildSiteRegistryProjectionSection` and `buildSiteRegistryProjectionRows` consume caller-supplied read-model or fixture JSON, emit bounded observation rows for registry freshness, relation lifecycle, publication edge, pending remote messages, capability readiness, and explicit live-fetch posture, and preserve projection-only/no-capability authority limits.
residuals: The provider does not perform live network fetch; it only exposes explicit live-fetch posture from caller configuration.
Rows are projection-only and do not grant Site authority, relation authority, or capability authority.
Narada proper local row providers remain owned by task 1450.
